notes: Run 4 (2026-07-18): diffed against the Run 3 SHA (42f46d0e, 2026-07-16, recorded on the still-open docs-sync/2026-07-13 branch/PR #13 since it hadn't merged to main) to current staging HEAD. The range's dominant change is a new 'Strategy Wallets' feature (~4.6k lines added across webapp/app/(authenticated)/components/{strategy-onboarding,wallet-panel,strategy-detail-sidebar}/ and webapp/app/(authenticated)/farming/**): every farming strategy (Day/Swing/Polymarket) and on-chain scheduled strategy now gets its own dedicated wallet (separate EVM+Solana address from the main wallet), with a 'Get this strategy ready' onboarding checklist (Hyperliquid fund+setup merged into one step; Polymarket kept separate), a rich chain/token fund modal with Max + minimum-amount hint ($50 Hyperliquid / $5 Polymarket), per-strategy wallet cards in both the main wallet panel and the strategy detail sidebar, a Withdraw flow, and an Archived-strategies list for closed-but-funded wallets. Documented as new 'Strategy Wallets' sections in strategies.mdx and wallet.mdx, with cross-links from hyperliquid.mdx (also corrected there: Day/Swing Trading strategies use their own separate Hyperliquid account/wallet, not the same one as manual chat trading — the prior 'same API wallet and collateral as manual chat trading' line was inaccurate). Also fixed a pre-existing, previously-missed inaccuracy in hyperliquid.mdx: five references describing Day Trading/Swing Trading as living 'under Settings' — they have always lived on the Strategies page (/strategies/farming/[kind]), confirmed absent from webapp/app/(authenticated)/settings/ by grep; strategies.mdx already had this right, hyperliquid.mdx did not. Verified (important correction vs. an unrelated, unmerged docs PR #15's claim): pausing/stopping a strategy does NOT auto-sweep its wallet funds back to the main wallet in the current webapp build — no 'delete strategy' UI is wired to the backend teardown-and-sweep endpoint; only manual Withdraw returns funds today. Light full sweep: re-confirmed the flag mechanism is unchanged (only account-deletion (on for all) and yield-page (internal-allowlist gated) registered in webapp/app/.well-known/vercel/flags/route.ts) and Strategy Wallets is not flag-gated. Two other commits in range were reviewed and found not applicable to user docs: 'feat(webapp): Ahrefs verification + analytics, fix scheme-less markdown link 404s' (SEO/analytics infra, not a product feature) and 'fix(strategy-agents): harden sub-agent money-movement + lifecycle' (backend-only hardening, no webapp-visible behavior change).
